title: Weighted K-Nearest-Neighbor Classification Process
description: A visual explanation of how a query point is classified using the weighted KNN algorithm, where closer neighbors have a greater influence on the final prediction.
elements: Training Data Points (Labeled Classes A, B, C)
relationships: The Query Point has Distances calculated to all Training Data Points
Distances are sorted to Identify the K Nearest Neighbors
A Weight is assigned to each neighbor based on its Distance
A Weighted Vote is tallied for each class from the neighbors
The class with the highest total Weighted Vote becomes the Predicted Class Label
